ListEipBp.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListEipBp.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000. Default value is 1000
ListEipBp.id: ID of the bandwidth package to query
ListEipBp.name: Name of the bandwidth package to query
ListEipBp.bindType: Resource type bound to the bandwidth package to query: "eip" (Elastic IP) or "eipgroup" (Shared Bandwidth)
ListEipBp.type: Type of the bandwidth package, including BandwidthPackage and AccelerationPackage (cross-border acceleration package). Defaults to all types selected
